headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Pool, Lowers Price Target to $215
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Sam Reid   maintains Pool (NASDAQ:POOL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $230 to $215.
